prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Rigging configuration, part of the Structural & Ironwork scope. The observed field condition is: hook latch missing/tied back. The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: ASME B30, OSHA 1926.251.
title: Tool and material selection: Rigging configuration (production floor)
